---
title: "mcp_bridge.js"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\scripts\mcp_bridge.js"
loc: 43
complexity: 4
logic_score: 8.25
style_score: 4.03
intel_score: 5.12
overall_score: 4.57
---

## Intent
The `mcp_bridge.js` sector implements modular logic focusing on __dirname, PROJECT_ROOT, main, args, command, prompt, systemPrompt, transport, client, result. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via __dirname, PROJECT_ROOT, main, args, command, prompt, systemPrompt, transport, client, result. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [Client](file://@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/client/index.js)
- [StdioClientTransport](file://@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/client/stdio.js)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [fileURLToPath](file://node:url)

### Exports
- `__dirname`
- `PROJECT_ROOT`
- `main`
- `args`
- `command`
- `prompt`
- `systemPrompt`
- `transport`
- `client`
- `result`
